languages.text: {n}Ваши планы не оставить повреждений на Торговом Патенте не сбываются. Впрочем, учитывая его размер, вряд ли кто-то заметит на нем пару небольших дырок, верно?..{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ваши планы не оставить повреждений на Торговом Патенте не сбываются. Впрочем, учитывая его размер, вряд ли кто-то заметит на нем пару небольших дырок, верно?..{/n}

languages.text: {n}Your intentions to inflict no damage on the Warrant of Trade are not panning out. However, given its size, it is unlikely that anyone will notice a few small holes, right...?{/n}

languages.text: {n}貿易証に損傷を与えないというあなたの意図はうまくいっていないようです。しかし、その大きさから、小さな穴がいくつかあっても、誰も気づかないでしょう？{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your intentions to inflict no damage on the Warrant of Trade are not panning out. However, given its size, it is unlikely that anyone will notice a few small holes, right...?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}貿易証に損傷を与えないというあなたの意図はうまくいっていないようです。しかし、その大きさから、小さな穴がいくつかあっても、誰も気づかないでしょう？{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tu intención de no dañar la Patente de Comercio no tiene el éxito que te hubiera gustado. Sin embargo, dado su tamaño es poco probable que alguien note unos pocos agujeritos... ¿verdad?{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your intentions to inflict no damage on the Warrant of Trade are not panning out. However, given its size, it is unlikely that anyone will notice a few small holes, right...?{/n}

languages.text: {n}Deine Bemühungen, den Handelsbrief nicht zu beschädigen, sind nicht von Erfolg gekrönt. Allerdings wird angesichts seiner Größe niemand ein paar kleine Löcher bemerken, oder?{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your intentions to inflict no damage on the Warrant of Trade are not panning out. However, given its size, it is unlikely that anyone will notice a few small holes, right...?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Deine Bemühungen, den Handelsbrief nicht zu beschädigen, sind nicht von Erfolg gekrönt. Allerdings wird angesichts seiner Größe niemand ein paar kleine Löcher bemerken, oder?{/n}

languages.text: {n}Votre tentative de ne pas endommager davantage la lettre de marque se solde par un échec. Cependant, elle est si grande que personne ne remarquera quelques petits trous dans le papier... Si ?{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your intentions to inflict no damage on the Warrant of Trade are not panning out. However, given its size, it is unlikely that anyone will notice a few small holes, right...?{/n}

languages.text: {n}你本不想对贸易授状造成任何损伤，但事与愿违。不过，考虑到它的尺寸，区区几个小洞，应该没人会注意到吧……？{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your intentions to inflict no damage on the Warrant of Trade are not panning out. However, given its size, it is unlikely that anyone will notice a few small holes, right...?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你本不想对贸易授状造成任何损伤，但事与愿违。不过，考虑到它的尺寸，区区几个小洞，应该没人会注意到吧……？{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ticari Ruhsatname'ye hiç zarar vermeme niyetin sonuç vermiyor. Ancak boyutu göz önüne alındığında kimsenin birkaç küçük deliği fark etmesi pek olası değil, değil mi?{/n}
